name: Chilled Tomato Soup (Awsome)
recipeIngredient: 6 Med Firm Ripe Tomatoes (3 Cups), Chopped & Pureed
1 Small ripe avocado, seeded, peeled and mashed to smooth paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat pureed tomatoes, sour cream, milk, lemon juice, tomato paste, and olive oil together with a whisk or spoon until well blended.
2. Stir in parsley, salt, pepper, and other seasonings. Taste.
3. Cover tightly with foil or plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 2 hours until thoroughly chilled.
4. Peel cucumber. Slice lengthwise in half. Scoop out seeds. Cut into 1/4-inch cubes; set aside.
5. To serve, beat the pureed avocado into the chilled soup and taste for seasoning.
6. Ladle into chilled tureen or individual bowls.
7. Serve at once with chopped cucumbers. Serves 4.
